title: Warm up
content: The slide showcases three illustrations related to urban settings in Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image portrays a different driving scenario within the cities.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide features images of taxis and urban scenes, symbolizing transportation and cultural landmarks in China. It introduces the concept of exploring China's evolution through its cities.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session involves matching cities to their unique features and development strategies. It emphasizes investigating local features to understand urban impact.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide outlines the development strategies for Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. The strategies focus on technology integration, sustainable development, and tourism.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide provides insights into how cities develop unique strategies based on local features. It highlights sustainable development, economic growth, and technology integration.
